case_title: JOHNSON, DELORIS et al VS OFA, SAKOPO et al

docket_entries.description: CORRESPONDENCE FROM SURETY COMPANY OF THE PACIFIC FILED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, DELORIS JOHNSON, RONALD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OFA, SAKOPO KAUVAKA GENERAL CONSTRUCTION KAUVAKA, PEIHOLANI OF KAUVAKA GENERAL CONSTRUCTION SURETY COMPANY OF THE PACIFIC $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $214.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,714.00, SURETY COMPANY OF THE PACIFIC DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE; WAS NOT BONDING COMPANY OF DEFENDANT OFA. DEFENDANT KAUVAKA GENERAL CONSTRUCTION COMPANY DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE - NO SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
